method: Fresh re-run against current codebase after the AC5 restamp fix: import smoke, module + full pytest, restamp dry-run, corpus inspection, live transcript review, secret scan.

criteria.reason: tools/axxon_mcp_security_credentials.py exposes check_password (read), change_my_password + change_my_login (gated writes on the session's own user, no user_id arg), plus connect_axxon_profile/ensure_client/_stub_and_pb2/_write_gate. Env AXXON_SECURITY_CREDENTIALS_APPROVE, token CONFIRM-security-credentials. Import OK.
GateTests in the new test file assert client.calls==[] for disabled/gap/error on both writes and for check_password empty user. Module suite 11/11 passes.

tools/axxon_mcp_server.py has all 6 wiring edits: param security_credentials (L69), conditional register (L217-218), register_security_credentials_tools with 4 @server.tool (L1186-1205), --enable-security-credentials flag (L1764), flag-gated instantiation (L1965-1969), pass to create_server (L2004). Server imports OK.

raw/live-verify.txt (treated as the evidence, live stand unreachable) shows check_password NOT_UNIQUE for current pw / OK for unused / error for empty; ChangePassword OK on throwaway user A then removed (present=False); ChangeLogin OK on throwaway user B then removed (present=False); root untouched; the demo host IP and any plaintext credential patterns are sanitized; no secrets present.

Fix confirmed. CheckPassword/ChangePassword/ChangeLogin are tested-pass; all 7 LDAP methods (TestLDAPConnection, StartLDAPSynchronization, StopLDAPSynchronization, SearchLDAP, SearchLDAP2, SearchLDAPGroups, GetLDAPSynchronizationState) are now tested-warn-fixture-needed with zero pending SecurityService rows remaining. Restamp dry-run reports 0 method(s) restamped. SecurityService 28/35 (23 tested-pass + 5 tested-pass-safe-record + 7 fixture-warn). Coverage doc headline 245 tested-pass / 82 pending / 34 fixture-warn and SecurityService 28/35; evidence.json coverage 245/82/34; corpus global totals reconcile (245 pass-stamp variants, 82 pending, 34 fixture-warn, 361 total).
python3.12 -m pytest tools/tests/ -q => 892 passed. No regressions.

commands_run: rg secret scan over task dir + production module
corpus inspection of SecurityService + global status counts
